hero_section.description: OneFam isn’t a label you forget in your closet. It’s your ticket into a crew that thinks bigger – loud, free, full of energy. Every piece you order doesn’t just level up your style; it catapults you into our story: full of adventure, good vibes, and real chances to land in Bali or a rooftop in New York.

vision_section.title: Our Vision
vision_section.subTitle: We Are Family, Period.
vision_section.description1: We believe in this simple formula: when you feel good, you change the world around you right away. That's why we don't pump part of our profit into annoying ads but into moments that make your heart race.
vision_section.description2: Your order makes the community bigger, our impact stronger – and opens a door to experiences you can't just book anywhere. Fashion as a badge for unity, freedom, and real added value: that drives us every single day.

process_flow.title: How It Works
process_flow.subTitle: Shop, Vote, Fly
process_flow.description: Our process is simple. No gimmicks, no subscriptions, just pure adventure waiting for you.

process.title: Shop
process.description: You click 'Order' – done. Your name lands automatically in the draw. No extra steps needed.

process.title: Vote
process.description: We all vote together on where the next OneFam mission goes: first continent, then country, then spot.

process.title: Fly
process.description: We fairly pick the lucky ones at random, and we cover everything – flight, hotel, spending money, event.

process_flow.description1: Fast fashion deals discounts, we deal memories. Instead of fleeting percentages, we give you stories you'll tell your grandkids.
process_flow.description2: The principle is reciprocity: you trust us with your outfit, we give you the chance for the adventure of a lifetime. That feeling of 'Thanks for being here' burns deeper than any coupon code – and that emotion is what turns customers into family.

products_section.title: Our Products
products_section.subTitle: Wear Stories, Not Just Fabric.
products_section.description: When you rock OneFam, you wear more than fashion. You wear a manifesto: for freedom, community, and damn good times. Every thread reminds you that upgrading your wardrobe can also upgrade your life.

straight_talk.title: Straight Talk
straight_talk.description: We believe in complete transparency. Here's exactly how it works.

straights.title: No Hidden Costs
straights.description: You always only pay for your shirt, your hoodie, your cap. The trip is our bonus from an internal community budget.

straights.title: Fair Selection
straights.description: No stake requirement, no hidden fees, one draw per person per year – clean, transparent, fair.

straights.title: Legally Sound
straights.description: So it stays style + chance, but never gambling. Promise. (And yes, our legal team has signed off on it.)

straights.title: All Inclusive
straights.description: We cover everything – flight, hotel, spending money, event. No subscription gimmicks, zero paperwork.

philosophy_section.description: We surround ourselves with people who encourage us to become the best version of ourselves. We distance ourselves from drama or negative influences, such as jealousy or hatred. Instead, we focus on spreading positive energy to bring out the best in everyone.

code_conduct_section.title: Code of Conduct
code_conduct_section.description: This family code reflects the values and principles of our family. It serves to strengthen our relationships, clarify expectations, and shape our shared journey as a family.

items.title: Love and Respect
items.content: In our family, love and respect are at the core. We treat each other with kindness, care, and consideration.

items.title: Open Communication
items.content: Open conversations and sharing thoughts and feelings are welcome. We actively listen and speak honestly and respectfully to one another.

items.title: Support and Unity
items.content: We are a team. We support each other in all aspects of life and encourage one another to pursue individual dreams and goals.

items.title: Shared Time
items.content: We value time together. Regular activities, such as shared outings, strengthen our bond and create memories.

items.title: Responsibility
items.content: Every family member shares responsibility for our community. Together, we contribute to creating a comfortable environment.

items.title: Diversity and Acceptance
items.content: We welcome diversity and accept our differences. Everyone in our family is unique and respected.

items.title: Education and Personal Development
items.content: We encourage lifelong learning and the development of our skills and interests.

items.title: Gratitude
items.content: We appreciate what we have and are thankful for the small and large joys of life.

items.title: Conflict Resolution
items.content: Conflicts are natural, and we are committed to resolving them respectfully. We work together to find fair solutions for everyone.

items.title: Safety and Security
items.content: Every member of the family contributes to safety and security. We protect ourselves from harmful influences and provide emotional support for each other.

items.title: Community Service
items.content: We contribute to strengthening our community by taking responsibility for the world around us.

faq_section.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_section.description: Everything you need to know about OneFam and our unique approach to fashion and experiences.

items.title: What is OneFam and how do you differ from other fashion brands?
items.content: OneFam is more than streetwear—we blend fashion with real-life experiences. Every purchase not only elevates your style but automatically enters you into our community bonus trip: instead of discount codes, we gift fully paid dream vacations, decided by random draw and community voting.

items.title: How do I enter the trip giveaway?
items.content: It’s simple: with every purchase of a shirt, hoodie, or cap, you’re automatically added to the draw. There’s no separate form, no signup, no extra fees. As soon as you click “Order” and complete payment, you’re in.

items.title: How often are the giveaways—and how many times can I win?
items.content: We hold giveaways regularly; exact dates are announced transparently on our website and social channels. Each person can be drawn *once per calendar year* to keep it fair for everyone.

items.title: How is the travel destination chosen?
items.content: Our entire community decides in three stages where the next OneFam mission goes: first the continent, then the country, and finally the specific spot. This creates a democratic, engaging voting experience where every participant has a say.

items.title: How are winners selected?
items.content: Once the destination is decided and there’s enough budget in the community pot, we randomly draw the winners. Every entrant has an equal chance. The draw is transparent and documented; winners are notified via email and our newsletter.

items.title: What happens when I'm selected as a winner?
items.content: Congratulations! We cover everything for you (and an optional guest): flight, accommodation, spending money, and a highlight event on-site. You’ll receive all travel documents from us—your only job is to pack and enjoy.

items.title: Do I have to pay extra or subscribe—and isn't this gambling?
items.content: No. You only pay for your clothing item; the giveaway is a free bonus funded from our internal community budget, which is filled from our profits. There’s no stake requirement, no hidden fees, and no subscriptions. Because you always receive a clear value (the product), this does not count as traditional gambling. Our legal team has confirmed it.
